question: Will the Zora (ZORA) token listed on Coinbase in June 2026 have a 7-day volume-weighted average price above $0.10 on CoinGecko as of 2026-07-11?
shortTitle: ZORA token 7-day VWAP above $0.10 by July 11
description: Zora launched its ZORA token in mid-2026 and secured a Coinbase listing, making its post-listing price trajectory one of the most watched altcoin events in the space.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the CoinGecko page for the Zora (ZORA) token shows a 7-day average price strictly above $0.10 USD as of 2026-07-11 23:59 UTC, per the CoinGecko token detail page price history. Resolves NO otherwise or if the token is delisted or data is unavailable by that date.

question: Will the Pudgy Penguins NFT collection floor price on OpenSea fall below 5 ETH at any point between 2026-06-28 and 2026-07-31?
shortTitle: Pudgy Penguins floor dips below 5 ETH by July 31
description: Pudgy Penguins has been a bellwether blue-chip NFT collection whose floor has been under sustained pressure during broader market volatility in 2026.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the Pudgy Penguins collection floor price on OpenSea is recorded at or below 4.999 ETH at any timestamp between 2026-06-28 00:00 UTC and 2026-07-31 23:59 UTC, per the OpenSea collection stats page for Pudgy Penguins. Resolves NO if the floor remains above 5 ETH throughout that entire window or if OpenSea data is unavailable.

question: Will the Aerodrome Finance (AERO) protocol on Base chain report a total value locked above $1.5 billion USD on DefiLlama at any point before 2026-08-01?
shortTitle: Aerodrome TVL hits $1.5B before Aug 1
description: Aerodrome Finance is the dominant DEX on Base and has been approaching key TVL thresholds as Base chain activity grows heading into summer 2026.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the DefiLlama protocol page for Aerodrome Finance shows a total value locked figure at or above $1,500,000,000 USD at any recorded daily snapshot between 2026-06-28 and 2026-07-31 inclusive, per DefiLlama. Resolves NO if no such snapshot is recorded by 2026-07-31 23:59 UTC or if the protocol page is removed.

question: Will the open-source repo 'browser-use/browser-use' on GitHub cross 75,000 stars before 2026-09-30?
shortTitle: browser-use/browser-use hits 75k GitHub stars by Sep 2026
description: browser-use is a fast-growing Python library for AI-driven browser automation that has been climbing GitHub trending lists in mid-2026.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the public GitHub repository at github.com/browser-use/browser-use shows a star count of 75,000 or more at any point on or before 2026-09-30, as read from the GitHub repository page or the GitHub API stars field. Resolves NO otherwise.

question: Will any model released by Mistral AI hold the top overall rank on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard on 2026-09-01?
shortTitle: Mistral model #1 on Chatbot Arena leaderboard Sept 1 2026
description: Chatbot Arena's public Elo leaderboard is one of the most-watched benchmarks for comparing frontier chat models, and Mistral has been a recurring challenger to OpenAI and Anthropic.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the model listed in the number-one overall position on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena public leaderboard at lmarena.ai on 2026-09-01 has 'Mistral' in its official model name as displayed on that leaderboard. Resolves NO if the top-ranked model belongs to any other provider, or if the leaderboard is unavailable on that date.
resolutionSource: LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard at lmarena.ai

question: Will the Cursor code editor app ship a native iOS or Android mobile client with a public stable release before 2026-12-31?
shortTitle: Cursor ships public mobile app (iOS or Android) by end 2026
description: Cursor is a widely used AI-first code editor built by Anysphere, and shipping a mobile client has been a frequently requested feature among its developer user base.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Anysphere publishes a stable (non-beta, non-invite-only) release of Cursor for iOS on the Apple App Store or for Android on the Google Play Store on or before 2026-12-31, confirmed by an official Anysphere blog post or changelog entry at cursor.com. Resolves NO otherwise.
resolutionSource: Official Anysphere changelog or blog at cursor.com

question: Will the Steam concurrent-player peak for Monster Hunter Wilds exceed 900,000 in July 2026?
shortTitle: Monster Hunter Wilds Steam peak CCU above 900k in July 2026
description: Monster Hunter Wilds set massive concurrent-player records on launch and the community is debating whether a major summer content drop will push it back toward or past its all-time peak.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if SteamDB records a 24-hour peak concurrent player count for Monster Hunter Wilds of 900,001 or more at any point between 2026-07-01 and 2026-07-31 inclusive, per the SteamDB historical chart for the game (appid 2246340). Resolves NO if no such peak is recorded by 2026-07-31.
resolutionSource: SteamDB (steamdb.info) historical concurrent players chart for Monster Hunter Wilds

question: Will Valve release the Deadlock patch that adds the official ranked matchmaking mode before 2026-09-01?
shortTitle: Deadlock official ranked mode patch ships before September 2026
description: Deadlock has been in beta with an informal ranking system and the playerbase has been actively tracking Valve's roadmap hints for a full ranked matchmaking rollout.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if an official Deadlock patch notes post on the Deadlock Steam store page or the Valve Deadlock official site explicitly describes the launch of a formal ranked matchmaking mode, and that post is dated on or before 2026-08-31, per the Steam Community announcements page for Deadlock (appid 1422450). Resolves NO otherwise.

question: Will Team Vitality win the BLAST Open Copenhagen 2026 CS2 tournament?
shortTitle: Team Vitality wins BLAST Open Copenhagen 2026
description: BLAST Open Copenhagen 2026 is a top-tier CS2 LAN event scheduled for summer 2026 and Team Vitality enters as a strong but contested favorite following their recent roster changes.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Team Vitality is listed as the first-place finisher of the BLAST Open Copenhagen 2026 CS2 tournament by 2026-08-15, per the official BLAST tournament bracket and results page at blast.tv. Resolves NO otherwise.

question: Will the subreddit r/place reach 10 million subscribers before 2027-01-01?
shortTitle: r/place hits 10M subscribers by end of 2026
description: r/place has seen periodic revival spikes tied to Reddit events and nostalgia cycles, and its subscriber count sits close enough to major milestones that the trajectory is genuinely uncertain.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the subscriber count displayed on the r/place subreddit page on Reddit reaches or exceeds 10,000,000 at any point on or before 2026-12-31, per the publicly visible Reddit community member count on reddit.com/r/place. Resolves NO otherwise.

question: Will the app Perplexity AI reach the number one spot on the US App Store free chart before 2026-09-01?
shortTitle: Perplexity AI hits #1 US App Store free chart by Sep 2026
description: Perplexity AI has repeatedly surged into the top 10 of the US App Store free chart during news cycles and product launches, making a brief number-one finish plausible but not certain.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Perplexity AI is listed as the number one free app on the US App Store free apps chart at any point on or before 2026-08-31, as reported by the publicly visible rankings on apps.apple.com or confirmed by a screenshot archived at web.archive.org or reported by 9to5Mac or TechCrunch citing the US App Store chart. Resolves NO otherwise.
resolutionSource: US App Store free apps chart via apps.apple.com

question: Will the YouTube channel MrBeast surpass 400 million subscribers before 2026-10-01?
shortTitle: MrBeast crosses 400M YouTube subscribers by Oct 2026
description: MrBeast is the most subscribed individual creator on YouTube and has been adding tens of millions of subscribers per year, making 400 million a plausible but not guaranteed milestone within this window.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the subscriber count shown on the MrBeast YouTube channel page at youtube.com/@MrBeast reaches or exceeds 400,000,000 at any point on or before 2026-09-30, as read directly from the channel page or reported by Social Blade tracking data for the MrBeast channel. Resolves NO otherwise.
resolutionSource: YouTube channel page for MrBeast at youtube.com/@MrBeast, confirmed via Social Blade

question: Will SpaceX's Starship Flight 9 reach orbital velocity before 2026-09-30?
shortTitle: Starship Flight 9 reaches orbital velocity by Sep 2026
description: Starship Flight 9 is the next integrated stack test following Flight 8, and reaching orbital velocity is the specific performance threshold that SpaceX has publicly targeted for this mission.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if SpaceX officially confirms via a post-flight mission summary on x.com/SpaceX or spacex.com that Starship Flight 9 achieved orbital velocity (defined as sustaining a speed above 7.8 km/s in the exoatmosphere) by 2026-09-30. Resolves NO if no such confirmation is published by that date, or if the flight is scrubbed, explodes before stage separation, or falls short of orbital velocity.
resolutionSource: spacex.com official mission summary or x.com/SpaceX post-flight statement

question: Will NASA's Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope complete its first light observation before 2027-03-31?
shortTitle: Roman Space Telescope achieves first light by Mar 2027
description: The Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope has a current launch target in late 2026, and first light is the initial milestone where the instrument captures its first calibrated science image after deployment.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if NASA publishes an official press release or mission status update on nasa.gov confirming that the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope has completed its first light observation by 2027-03-31. Resolves NO if no such announcement appears on nasa.gov by that date.
resolutionSource: nasa.gov official press release or Roman mission status page

question: Will the BREATHE-2 phase 3 trial of dupilumab for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease report its primary endpoint results before 2026-12-31?
shortTitle: BREATHE-2 dupilumab COPD phase 3 readout by Dec 2026
description: Sanofi and Regeneron are running the BREATHE-2 phase 3 trial evaluating dupilumab in moderate-to-severe COPD patients, a follow-on to the positive BOREAS and NOTUS trials, with a primary endpoint of exacerbation rate reduction.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Sanofi or Regeneron publishes a press release on sanofi.com or regeneron.com, or if full primary endpoint results appear in a peer-reviewed journal or at a named major respiratory congress (ATS, ERS, or CHEST), reporting the BREATHE-2 primary endpoint outcome by 2026-12-31. Resolves NO if no such publication or announcement is made by that date.
resolutionSource: sanofi.com or regeneron.com press release, or peer-reviewed publication indexed on PubMed

question: Will Lamine Yamal score in Spain's 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16 match?
shortTitle: Yamal scores in Spain R16 match
description: Lamine Yamal has been one of the tournament's standout attackers and Spain are heavy favorites to reach the knockout rounds, making his individual scoring record a live debate among bettors.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Lamine Yamal is credited with at least one goal in Spain's official 2026 FIFA World Cup Round of 16 match (including any extra time, excluding penalty shootout goals) by 2026-07-05, per the official FIFA match report published on FIFA.com. Resolves NO if Spain do not reach the Round of 16, if Yamal does not appear, or if he does not score by that date.

question: Will Morocco finish as the top scorer in Group F of the 2026 FIFA World Cup with 7 or more goals?
shortTitle: Morocco 7+ goals to top Group F scoring
description: Morocco's attacking output in the group stage has drawn attention given their deep squad and favorable draw, and whether they can post a historically high goal tally for the group is a specific and unsettled question.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Morocco are the highest-scoring team in 2026 FIFA World Cup Group F at the end of the group stage and have scored 7 or more goals across all three group matches, by 2026-07-02, per the official FIFA.com tournament statistics page. Resolves NO otherwise.

question: Will Florian Wirtz be officially announced as a Real Madrid signing before 2026-08-01?
shortTitle: Wirtz officially signed by Real Madrid by Aug 1
description: Florian Wirtz has been persistently linked to Real Madrid in the summer 2026 transfer window and any official announcement would be reported simultaneously by Real Madrid's official channels and major outlets.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if Real Madrid publish an official announcement on realmadrid.com confirming the permanent transfer or signing of Florian Wirtz on or before 2026-07-31. Resolves NO if no such announcement appears on that page by that date.

question: Will the film 'F1' starring Brad Pitt earn more than $65 million in its opening weekend at the North American domestic box office?
shortTitle: F1 (Brad Pitt film) opens above $65M domestic
description: Apple Original Films and Warner Bros. are releasing the Formula 1 racing drama F1 in late June 2026, and tracking has been volatile given its massive production cost and niche sport appeal.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the official North American domestic opening-weekend gross for F1 (2026), as reported by Box Office Mojo on their title page for the film, is greater than $65,000,000 for the three-day weekend of its opening. Resolves NO if Box Office Mojo reports a figure at or below $65,000,000, or if no official figure is published by 2026-07-07.
resolutionSource: Box Office Mojo (boxofficemojo.com) title page for F1 (2026)

question: Will Charli XCX's next studio album debut at number 1 on the Billboard 200 in its first charting week?
shortTitle: Charli XCX next album debuts at #1 Billboard 200
description: Following the massive cultural moment of Brat in 2024, Charli XCX's anticipated follow-up project carries strong streaming momentum but faces a crowded release landscape.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the Billboard 200 chart dated on or before 2026-09-26 lists a studio album credited to Charli XCX at position number 1 in its debut charting week, as shown on Billboard's official website at billboard.com/charts/billboard-200. Resolves NO otherwise or if no such album charts by that date.

question: Will the Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer score for 'Zootopia 2' be 80% or higher at the close of its opening weekend?
shortTitle: Zootopia 2 Tomatometer at or above 80% opening weekend
description: Disney's long-awaited Zootopia sequel arrives in 2026 with high audience expectations, but sequels to beloved originals frequently underwhelm critics compared to their predecessors.
resolutionCriteria: Resolves YES if the Tomatometer score displayed on the official Rotten Tomatoes page for Zootopia 2 is 80% or higher as of 11:59 PM ET on 2026-11-30, provided the score is based on at least 40 reviews. Resolves NO if the score is below 80%, fewer than 40 reviews are counted by that time, or no score is published by 2026-11-30.
resolutionSource: Rotten Tomatoes official title page for Zootopia 2 (rottentomatoes.com)
